name: Cace Floor Lamp - FLL4074 - Nickle - Safavieh
description: Elevate your space with the Cace Floor Lamp, a stunning piece standing at 60 inches. This elegant lamp brings together nickel and glass elements, creating a sophisticated focal point for any room. The iron frame ensures stability, while the glass accents add a touch of modern flair. Designed to complement various interiors, its nickel finish enhances its sleek appearance, making it a versatile addition whether in a cozy corner or in a reading nook. The Cace Floor Lamp offers both functionality and style, providing ample lighting for your needs. Illuminate your home with this exquisite lamp that blends form and function seamlessly.
